ApiGatewayEndpoints.description: Map of endpoint key => configuration for external API proxying. Each entry should have at minimum a 'url' key. Optional keys: 'token', 'tokenHeader', 'allowedMethods', 'timeout', 'permission'.

ApiGatewayAllowedResponseHeaders.description: Response headers from external API that are forwarded back in the API response.

ApiGatewayMaxBodySize.description: Maximum request body size in bytes (default 2MB).

ApiGatewayDefaultTimeout.description: Default timeout for external requests in seconds.
